title: Pack 10 Square Christmas Cards 2 Gingerbread Man Designs
features: SEND OUT A MERRY CHRISTMAS MESSAGE: Spread a little bit of that magical Christmas spirit around this year with this stylish giftmaker Chistmas card box set. Ideal for giving to work colleagues or passing out to school friends
PERFECT FOR THE FESTIVE SEASON: If you're looking for a beautifully designed Christmas card pack this year, full of festive joy and christmas spirit then this pack is ideal for you

TRADITIONAL FESTIVE CHRISTMAS DESIGNS: This selection of cards come in a range of designs and colours, each with a Christmas Greeting inside. Each pack has two different card designs of the same theme. Design: Festive Gingerbread Fun
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: All the cards in this Christmas card box are fully recyclable and plastic free. Feel even better when spreading that Christmas joy with these eco friendly cards

IDEAL SIZE MULTIPACK: This multi-pack of christmas cards contains 2 cards in 2 designs. All of the cards are an easy to send letter size, to help spread the cost of your Xmas. Approx size: 148 x 148mm
description: Pack of 10 stylish traditional Christmas cards featuring two different gingerbread designs. Each card is completed with its own Christmas message. Everyone will want to send these wonderful cards to loved ones at Christmas.
